summary: Iteration 151 - Frontend testing for 6 bug fixes. All 8 features verified successfully. Wealth Trends Net Worth matches header ($1,608,800). Rebalancing chart shows clean rounded percentages. Stock Research tabs have white text on dark blue active state. /client-360 loads without crashing. Super Guarantee Calculator shows personal super projection with David & Sarah balances. Retirement Confidence Factors tab shows * hover tooltips with Monte Carlo explanations.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts still render correctly but warnings appear in console
Route /super-guarantee shows blank page - the actual calculator is at /sg-calculator. Consider adding redirect or fixing route.

action_items: Consider adding redirect from /super-guarantee to /sg-calculator for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: TEST 1 - Wealth Trends Net Worth: PASS - Shows $1,608,800 matching header badge exactly
TEST 2 - Rebalancing Chart Percentages: PASS - All visible percentages are clean (1 decimal max): 5.9%, 10.0%, 50.8%, etc.
TEST 3 - Stock Research Tab Styling: PASS - Active tabs have white text (rgb(255,255,255)) on dark blue background (rgb(26,39,68))
TEST 4 - /client-360 Page Load: PASS - Page loads without crashing, shows Wheeler family data
TEST 5 - Super Guarantee Calculator: PASS - Shows personal super projection with David ($245,000) and Sarah ($198,000) balances at /sg-calculator
TEST 6 - Retirement Confidence Factors Tooltips: PASS - * hover tooltips show Monte Carlo explanations on hover
TEST 7 - Dashboard Numbers Consistency: PASS - Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200
TEST 8 - No JavaScript Errors: PASS - No error boundaries or error elements visible
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Thompson family mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified. Key routes: /dashboard (main), /investments (rebalancing tab), /stock-research, /client-360, /sg-calculator (NOT /super-guarantee), /retirement-confidence (Factors tab). Compliance modal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking 'I Understand'. For Retirement Confidence factors: click Factors tab, hover over * next to factor names to see tooltips.
